hero.subtitle: We help you choose the right one
hero.description: We don't broker applications. We build finance-ready companies.
hero.cta1: See if you're a good fit for us

intro.title: Financing is not an access problem,
intro.p1: Companies that secure financing on favorable terms aren't the ones that search the most — they're the ones that are properly prepared.
intro.p2: Capital Hub starts from the company and how it functions financially, not from the financing product.

process.title: The process through which a company becomes
process.subtitle: We work in stages, so that every financial decision is supported by structure, not circumstance.

step1.title: Financial diagnostic
step1.description: We analyze the company and identify the real bottlenecks affecting its stability and bankability.
step1.cta: See the Capital Hub Financial Diagnostic service

step2.title: Financial structuring and optimization
step2.description: We correct the financial structure and align the company with lenders' requirements.
step2.cta: See the Capital Hub Financial Structuring service

step3.title: Financing access
step3.description: We select and negotiate the right solutions based on the company's actual situation.
step3.cta: See the Capital Hub Financing Access service

step4.title: Monitoring and financial partnership
step4.description: We ensure continuity, stability, and long-term decision support.
step4.cta: See the Capital Hub Financial Partnership service

special.title: For complex situations
special.description: We intervene with advanced financial optimization solutions.
special.cta: See the Capital Hub Financial Optimization service

differentiation.title: We don't broker chaos.
differentiation.p1: We don't start from financing and we don't offer standard solutions.
differentiation.p2: We first build the structure that makes financing possible and sustainable.

finalCta.title: Do you have an active company and want to understand if it can be financed properly?
finalCta.cta: See if you're a good fit for us

services.title: All services are part of the same
services.subtitle: The process is simple and logical: Diagnostic → Structuring → Financing → Partnership. Each stage builds the next.

diagnostic.label: Starter package
diagnostic.title: Capital Hub Financial Diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: The first step toward any sound financial decision
diagnostic.description: Provides clarity on how the company operates and identifies exactly what prevents access to financing on favorable terms.
includes: Applied financial analysis (liquidity, debt ratio, turnover ratios)
diagnostic.deliverable: Structured financial report (6–10 pages), clear and actionable

structuring.label: Structuring package
structuring.title: Capital Hub Financial Structuring
structuring.subtitle: The stage where the company becomes finance-ready
structuring.description: We transform how the company operates from a financial standpoint, so it can sustain proper financing.
includes: Balance sheet corrections (including accrued income, inventory, liabilities)
structuring.differentiator: We translate the company into banking language

financing.label: Financing package
financing.title: Capital Hub Financing Access
financing.subtitle: Access to financing, on the right terms
financing.description: Activated after structuring or for companies already prepared. We don't submit applications at random. We choose the right solution.

optimization.label: Advanced package
optimization.title: Capital Hub Financial Optimization
optimization.subtitle: Advanced interventions for complex situations
optimization.description: For companies that require deep adjustments or are under financial pressure.

partnership.label: Partnership package
partnership.title: Capital Hub Financial Partnership
partnership.subtitle: Long-term stability and control
partnership.description: We ensure continuity and decision support, so the company remains finance-ready.

services.cta1: See if you're a good fit for us
services.footerNote: Our services don't work in isolation. They are part of a process through which companies become more stable, more predictable, and easier to finance.

financingTypes.title: Not all financing types are right for your company.
financingTypes.titleHighlight: We help you choose the correct one.
financingTypes.subtitle: We don't just present options. We filter and structure them based on your actual situation.
financingTypes.principle: The type of financing is the result of the company's structure, not the starting point.

bankLoans.title: Bank loans
bankLoans.description: For stable companies with sound financial indicators that need working capital, investments, or credit lines.

factoring.title: Factoring
factoring.description: For companies with delayed receivables and cash-flow pressure. Particularly suited for B2B relationships.

alternative.title: Alternative financing (NBFI / funds)
alternative.description: For situations where a bank is not an option, or for needs that require flexibility and customized structuring.

leasing.title: Leasing / Sale & Leaseback
leasing.description: For optimizing capital tied up in assets and obtaining liquidity without traditional credit.

grants.title: Non-repayable grants
grants.description: For eligible projects, planned investments, digitalization, and development with a co-financing component.

financingTypes.unsure: If you're not sure what suits you:
financingTypes.unsureCta: See if you're a good fit for us

about.title: Built for companies seeking
about.p1: Capital Hub was built for companies that don't just seek access to financing, but clarity in decision-making and a controlled process — without costly trial and error on their own.
about.p2: At the core of this process lies hands-on experience in financial analysis, structuring, and negotiation with financial institutions. We have worked with companies at various stages of development and understand how they are actually evaluated by lenders — not just from a theoretical perspective.
about.p3: This experience allows us to intervene where it matters and build solutions that work in practice, not just on paper.

team.heroDescription: The Capital Hub team brings together experts with extensive experience in financing, banking, consultancy, and management — dedicated to the success of your business.
team.ctaText: Schedule a discussion with the Capital Hub team and learn how we can help.

ciprian.name: Ciprian V.
ciprian.bio: Ciprian has over two decades of experience leading and transforming organizations, both in the private sector and in strategic projects of national impact. An economist by training, with a strong grounding in management and financial analysis, he approaches financing and partnerships with rigor, structure, and a constant focus on results.
strengths: CEO experience across multiple companies, including publicly listed organizations
Entrepreneurial background and a proven ability to build and launch new ventures
Advisory involvement in public initiatives of strategic relevance
Economics background with a hands-on perspective on the real needs of SMEs

iulia.name: Iulia V.
iulia.bio: Iulia has over 14 years of experience within the Parliament of Romania, where she managed administrative, operational, and coordination activities in highly complex structures. At Capital Hub, she ensures the operational running of the platform and coordinates the entire administrative flow of collaborations and contracts.
strengths: Extensive experience in public administration and legislative processes
Management of operational projects and complex activities
Collaboration with NGOs and public institutions
Attention to detail and discipline in handling documents and processes

dan.name: Dan C.
dan.bio: Dan has over two decades of entrepreneurial experience, during which he has developed and coordinated projects across diverse fields — spanning operational, commercial, and strategic components. At Capital Hub, he actively contributes to expanding the portfolio and developing client relationships.
strengths: Over two decades of entrepreneurship and diverse projects
Ability to build and maintain trusted relationships
Results orientation and a sharp eye for opportunity
Adaptability and a strong grasp of business mechanics

sorin.name: Sorin B.
sorin.bio: Sorin has over two decades of experience in financial services, management, and strategic development, built in roles such as Managing Partner and Associate Partner at companies in leasing, consultancy, and financial operations. He oversees portfolio integration, application assessment, and the coordination of financial processes at Capital Hub.
strengths: Over 20 years of experience in financial services and management
Expertise in relationships with banks, lenders, and investors
Strong skills in structuring, analyzing, and submitting financial portfolios
Economics background and a strategic perspective on financial products

stefan.name: Stefan D.
stefan.bio: Stefan brings over 20 years of deep expertise in software development, marketing, and communications, serving as the specialist who bridges business vision with precise technical execution. At Capital Hub, he leads the technology and IT advisory function, ensuring the digital architecture and internal processes stay tightly aligned with the team's objectives and client needs.
strengths: Extensive experience coordinating complex technology migrations and managing deliverables
Expertise in software architecture, web applications, and cloud infrastructure
Strong skills in identifying solutions for digitalization and emerging technologies
Focus on scalable, secure, and long-term sustainable solutions

adina.name: Adina R.
adina.bio: Adina has over three decades of experience in the economic and financial field, during which she has coordinated the economic and financial processes of a group of companies and managed complex structures across the SME and corporate segments.
strengths: Over 30 years of experience in accounting and financial analysis
Coordination of economic and financial processes at the group-of-companies level
Expertise in financing for investments, ongoing operations, and European projects

bogdan.name: Bogdan S.
bogdan.bio: Bogdan has over 15 years of experience in banking and financing, consolidated through coordination and management roles in banking institutions and in organizations with complex sales structures. He specializes in structuring lending solutions for SMEs.
strengths: Over 15 years of experience in banking and financing
Expertise in structuring loans for SMEs
Ability to negotiate and optimize lending terms

robert.name: Robert T.
robert.bio: Robert has over 15 years of experience in banking, lending, and financial consultancy, gained at top banking institutions and at companies specialized in financial services for SMEs. At Capital Hub, he plays a decisive role in shaping lending solutions for companies.
strengths: Over 15 years of experience in banking and financial consultancy
Expertise in structuring and negotiating SME loans
Professionalism, rigor, and a consistent focus on results

livia.name: Livia D.
livia.bio: Livia has over 20 years of experience in accounting and financial management, gained in international companies and in financial coordination roles. For nearly 9 years she held the position of Chief Accountant at BNP Paribas Personal Finance, where she coordinated accounting, reporting, and tax compliance activities.
strengths: Over 20 years of experience in accounting and financial management
Expertise in financial reporting, tax compliance, and process optimization
Experience implementing ERP systems such as WizPro, Microsoft Dynamics NAV, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central

compatibility.title: We don't work with just any company.
compatibility.titleHighlight: We only work with those that can be properly structured.
compatibility.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll tell you whether we can help — or not.
workWithItems: You have an active company for at least 6–12 months
You have real revenue and turnover
You have cash-flow issues, not a complete lack of activity
You are willing to adjust how your company operates
compatibility.dontWorkWith: We are not a good fit if:
dontWorkWithItems: You need money urgently, regardless of terms
The company is in severe distress or under enforcement
You are only looking for a banking connection

form.triedFinancing: Have you tried to obtain financing in the last 6 months?
form.willingToAdjust: Are you willing to make financial adjustments in your company?
form.consent: I agree to the processing of my data in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

compatibility.afterText: We review the information submitted and get back to you within 24–48 hours.
compatibleItems: We explain exactly how we can help

resources.title: Useful content for entrepreneurs seeking
resources.comingSoonText: We are preparing articles, guides, and case studies on cash-flow, bankability, financial structuring, and the banking relationship.

contact.subtitle: Fill in the form or contact us directly. Our team will respond within 24 business hours.

footer.copyright: Capital Hub Finance. All rights reserved.
footer.closing: Sound financial decisions for sustainable growth.

cookieBanner.text: We use essential cookies for the site to work properly. We do not use marketing or analytics cookies on public pages.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: Capital Hub Finance, as data controller, processes the personal data collected through this site in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Romanian legislation.
For any questions about how we process your data, you can reach us at contact@capitalhub.ro.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
paragraphs: We collect the data you voluntarily provide through the site's forms: name, email, phone, company name, registration ID (CUI), industry, revenue, and a description of your financial situation.
For the admin area we collect an email address and a password for authentication. We do not use tracking or analytics cookies on public pages.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
paragraphs: We use the data to respond to your inquiries, assess fit with our services, deliver agreed financial consultancy, and communicate during the engagement.
We do not send marketing communications and we do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: Processing is based on your consent (when you submit forms), the performance of a contract once you become a client, and our legitimate interest in operating the site and responding to inquiries.

sections.title: 5. Providers and partners
paragraphs: Data is stored on Google Cloud Platform (Firebase Firestore and Firebase Authentication), a provider with security measures aligned with GDPR.
Access to data is restricted to Capital Hub team members who need it to deliver the services.

sections.title: 6. Retention period
paragraphs: We keep inactive inquiries for 24 months, after which we anonymize or delete them. For active clients we retain data for the duration of the engagement plus the retention periods required by financial and tax legislation.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction, and objection regarding your data, as well as the right to withdraw consent at any time.
To exercise these rights or to file a complaint, write to us at contact@capitalhub.ro or contact the Romanian National Authority for the Supervision of Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP).

sections.title: 8. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be published on this page, with the date of the last update shown above.

terms.title: Terms and
terms.subtitle: The terms governing use of the Capital Hub Finance website and services.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing and using the website www.capitalhub.finance, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with these terms and conditions.
If you do not agree with any of the provisions, please do not use the site.

sections.title: 2. Site content and purpose
paragraphs: The site presents information about the financial consultancy services offered by Capital Hub Finance: financial diagnostic, structuring, financing access, optimization, and financial partnership.
The content is informational and does not constitute personalized financial, legal, or tax advice. For recommendations specific to your situation, please contact us.

sections.title: 3. Permitted use
paragraphs: You may access and use the site's content for personal and professional purposes within legal limits.

The following are not permitted: systematic copying of content, republishing on other sites without written agreement, automated use (scraping, scanning), modified distribution, or use for unlawful purposes.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual property
paragraphs: All text, images, graphics, and the structure of the site are owned by Capital Hub Finance or its partners and are protected by copyright legislation.
Trademarks, logos, and names mentioned belong to their respective owners.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimers
paragraphs: The information presented may change without prior notice. Capital Hub Finance makes reasonable efforts to keep the content up to date but does not guarantee that the site will operate uninterrupted or error-free.
Site content does not replace personalized professional assessment for your specific financial situation.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: Capital Hub Finance is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profit, or harm resulting from the use or inability to use the site, or from actions taken based on the information published here, outside the scope of a contractual engagement.

sections.title: 7. External links
paragraphs: The site may contain links to third-party websites. Capital Hub Finance does not control and is not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of those sites.

sections.title: 8. Changes to the terms
paragraphs: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect on publication on this page, with the date of the last update shown above.

sections.title: 9. Governing law and contact
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Romanian law. Any disputes will be settled by the competent courts in Romania.
For questions about these terms you can contact us at contact@capitalhub.ro.

cookies.title: Cookie
cookies.subtitle: What cookies are and how we use them on this site.

sections.title: 1. What cookies are
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a site. They allow the site to remember information about your visit, such as preferred language or authentication state.

sections.title: 2. How we use cookies
paragraphs: We use a minimal number of cookies, only for the basic functioning of the site. We do not use marketing, analytics, or profiling cookies on public pages.
The cookies we use are essential and cannot be disabled without affecting basic functionality.

sections.title: 3. Types of cookies used
paragraphs: Preference cookie (capitalhub_cookie_consent): stores your choice regarding the cookie banner. Saved in localStorage, valid until manually cleared.
Firebase authentication cookies: used exclusively in the admin area (/admin/) to maintain the authorized session. They are not set on public pages.

sections.title: 4. Third-party providers
paragraphs: For admin area authentication we use Firebase Authentication, a Google Cloud service with appropriate security measures. No personal data of public visitors is transmitted to Firebase by simply browsing the site.

sections.title: 5. Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can change your cookie banner choice by clearing localStorage from your browser settings.
Most browsers allow you to disable or clear cookies from settings (Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies; Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security; Safari: Preferences > Privacy).

sections.title: 6. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this cookie policy. The current version is indicated by the last-updated date above.
